subject: ap-calculus-ab
title: Region R — Rotation about y=-2, Isosceles Right Triangle Cross Sections & Equal Area Line
stimulus: Let $R$ be the region enclosed by the graph of $f(x) = x^4 - 2.3x^3 + 4$ and the horizontal line $y = 4$, as shown in the figure.

parts.prompt: Find the volume of the solid generated when $R$ is rotated about the horizontal line $y = -2$.
rubric_criteria: 1 pt: Finds limits of integration: $f(x) = 4 \Rightarrow x = 0$ and $x = 2.3$
1 pt: Sets up washer method with outer radius $= 4 - (-2) = 6$ and inner radius $= f(x) - (-2) = f(x) + 2$

parts.prompt: Region $R$ is the base of a solid. For this solid, each cross section perpendicular to the $x$-axis is an isosceles right triangle with a leg in $R$. Find the volume of the solid.
rubric_criteria: 1 pt: Cross-section area: leg $= 4 - f(x)$; area of isosceles right triangle with leg $a$ is $\frac{1}{2}a^2$; area $= \frac{1}{2}(4-f(x))^2$

parts.prompt: The vertical line $x = k$ divides $R$ into two regions with equal areas. Write, but do not solve, an equation involving integral expressions whose solution gives the value $k$.
rubric_criteria: 1 pt: Correct expression for area of one region: $\int_0^k (4 - f(x))\, dx$
1 pt: Correct equation: $\int_0^k (4-f(x))\, dx = \int_k^{2.3}(4-f(x))\, dx$ (or equivalent)
parts.scoring_notes: From scoring key: $\int_0^k(4-f(x))\, dx = \int_k^{2.3}(4-f(x))\, dx$ (do not solve for $k$).
